---
title: "The Rev. Duke John Yonge"
---

## The Rev. Duke John Yonge

**Dates:** (9 May 1809-10 Jan 1846)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

The son of Rev. Duke Yonge, Vicar of Antony, he married (1840) Elizabeth Roberts, who married, secondly, Captain Scott;  his three sons were Duke Dowton Yonge, R.N., Kenneth Duke Yonge and Walter Duke Yonge. [The 1851 census suggests there was another, James]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
